name: Firefox Focus
description: Mozilla's privacy-focused mobile browser that blocks trackers and erases browsing history automatically.

years.notes: Original Firefox Focus app icon (iOS launch, November 2016). Rounded square with purple-magenta gradient background and white Firefox fox mark inside a circle. Vectorized from PNG raster.
Mozilla 2019 brand system redesign. Flat pink-magenta fox/flame logomark on transparent background, no circular container.
New logo introduced with Firefox Focus 93 (October 2021). Purple-violet fox with flame, orange-coral accent globe — aligns with the Firefox Quantum identity system.
